unit: Unit 8: Apps and the App Store
title: The App Store
drDigitalIntro: The App Store is Apple's marketplace for Mac apps. Open the App Store app and you'll see thousands of apps: games, productivity tools, photo editors, and more. You can search for specific apps or browse by category. Many apps are free; some cost money. Buy an app once and it's yours forever — or pay a subscription for ongoing access. All apps in the App Store are reviewed by Apple for safety.
drDigitalSuccess: You know where to find and buy apps!
drDigitalHint: App Store is the safest place to get Mac apps.
